title: easy45: assembly-free recovery of the 45S nrDNA transcribed unit and ribotype diversity from PacBio HiFi reads
description: Pure-Python tool that recruits spanning PacBio HiFi reads and reconstructs the mature 45S nrDNA transcribed unit (18S-ITS1-5.8S-ITS2-26S), ITS barcode and phased intragenomic ribotypes without genome assembly, treating each spanning read as one molecule. Long-read counterpart of ngs45 (Illumina).

creators.name: Trinh, Hoai Vu
creators.affiliation: Seoul National University, Seoul, Republic of Korea; An Giang University, Vietnam National University Ho Chi Minh City, An Giang, Vietnam
